references: POL-DH: Pressemitteilung der Polizeiinspektion Diepholz vom 06.06.2026; Polizeiinspektion Diepholz, 06 JUN 2026

reports.description: CHMU confirmed a tornado in Děčín Bynov on Friday. Multiple eyewitness videos show a rapidly rotating column of air with strong upward motion beneath the storm. Amateur meteorologist David Boura documented ground damage, including an uprooted weak tree. The tornado was rated IF0.5.
references: Eyewitness report via  Český hydrometeorologický ústav (on Facebook), 07 JUN 2026.

reports.description: A brief tornado was observed. A velocity couplet was identified in radar data.[EDIT, 06.06.2026, Igor Laskowski] Damage was reported in Inulec, including a damaged tin garage and an uprooted spruce tree (DI: TRW/DoD 3 = IF0.5). According to eyewitness reports, a tornado was responsible for the damage. The tornado was captured on video from Faszcze, although at that time it was moving through the Cudnochy area. Further updates will follow. [EDIT, 08.06.2026, Igor Laskowski] A further damage survey conducted by Jakub Malczyk revealed tornado-related damage in a local forest near Cudnochy. Several weak pine trees were snapped (DI: TRW/DoD 5 = IF1), while several other pine trees were uprooted. Consequently, the tornado rating was upgraded to IF1. Path length at least 3,3 km.
references: Eyewitness report via Polscy Łowcy Burz (on X), 05 JUN 2026.
Eyewitness report via Polscy Łowcy Burz (on Facebook), 06 JUN 2026.
Eyewitness report via Piotr Szuster (on X), 07 JUN 2026.
